// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{



    private static readonly int[] _keys = new int[] {
        1, 4, 7, 10, 12
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(int key)
    {
        if ((key < 1))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((key > 12))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((key > 1) && (key < 4)))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((key > 4) && (key < 7)))
        {
         return false;
        }



        for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
        {
            if (key == _keys[i])
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 5;
    public const int MinKey = 1;
    public const int MaxKey = 12;
}
